tagline.en: Almost safe to plant the warm friends!
tagline.da: Naesten sikkert at plante de varme venner!

tasks.action: Harvest first radishes from Bed A (sown W16)

prompt.en: Grab the green top and PULL! Rinse it off and taste it -- is it spicy or mild?
prompt.da: Tag fat i det groenne top og TRAEK! Skyl den og smag -- er den staerk eller mild?

tasks.action: Sow bush bean seeds in Bed B (after last frost)

prompt.en: Push each bean into the soil -- they look like little kidneys!
prompt.da: Tryk hver boenne ned i jorden -- de ligner smaa nyrer!

prompt.en: Water each bed carefully -- the new seedlings need gentle watering.
prompt.da: Vand hvert bed forsigtigt -- de nye spirer har brug for blidd vanding.

tasks.action: Check weather forecast for frost -- cover tender seedlings if needed

prompt.en: Last frost date is around May 10 -- keep fleece ready for cold nights this week.
prompt.da: Sidste frostdato er omkring 10. maj -- hold fiberdug klar til kolde naetter i denne uge.

growth_events.event: First radishes ready to pull -- pink tops visible above soil

prompt.en: See the pink top poking out? That means it's ready -- PULL!
prompt.da: Ser du den lyserode top, der stikker op? Det betyder den er klar -- TRAEK!

prompt.en: The peas are racing up the trellis! How high have they climbed?
prompt.da: Aerterne klatrer op ad espalieren! Hvor hoejt er de kommet?

sowing_tasks.action: Sow third succession radish in Bed C
Sow second spring onion batch in Bed C
Sow first bush bean seeds in Bed B
